content: Add publicSlug field to Hotel model for human-readable URLs
Create backend API: GET /api/public/hotels/search (search by city/name)
Create backend API: GET /api/public/hotels/:slug (get hotel profile by slug)
Create frontend PublicHotelPage.js at route /book/:hotelSlug with marketplace theme
Create frontend BrowseHotels.js at route /browse with search by location
Add public link display + copy button in hotel Settings page
Update MCP routes to return public page URLs instead of ?hotel=id format
Test public pages with screenshots and verify SEO-friendly structure
